name: AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner (CLF-C02)
description: Entry-level certification validating overall understanding of the AWS Cloud. Targeted at individuals in technical, managerial, sales, purchasing, or financial roles. Covers cloud concepts, security/compliance, core AWS services, and billing/pricing. 65 questions, 90 minutes, 700/1000 passing score.
exportIntroQuestions:
## About this document

This document is a collection of practice exam questions for the **AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner (CLF-C02)** certification. The questions were selected because they represent foundational cloud computing concepts that every AWS practitioner should understand.

### Certification context

This certification validates overall understanding of the AWS Cloud, including topics such as:

* Cloud computing concepts and the AWS value proposition
* The AWS Shared Responsibility Model and security best practices
* Core AWS services across compute, storage, networking, and databases
* Cloud architecture design principles (reliability, scalability, cost optimization)
* AWS pricing models, billing, and support plans

### About the questions

Each question in this document is independent and should be analyzed as a standalone scenario. Practice exams intentionally present isolated situations, and questions may appear in any order during the actual certification exam. Information from one question should never be assumed to apply to another.

For each scenario, this document includes:

* The original practice exam question.
* An explanation of the reasoning behind the correct answer.
* A discussion of why the remaining options are less appropriate for the stated requirements.

### Learning objective

The primary goal of this material is to develop a solid understanding of AWS fundamentals rather than memorization. The focus should be on understanding the core concepts, identifying the appropriate AWS services for common use cases, and recognizing the principles that guide cloud architecture decisions.

By studying the reasoning behind each answer, readers can build the foundational knowledge expected for the AWS Cloud Practitioner certification exam.
exportIntroTranscripts:
## About this document

This document contains technical summaries of lesson transcripts related to the **AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner (CLF-C02)** certification.

### Purpose
Organizes and synthesizes lesson content in a structured format for quick review and deeper understanding of the concepts presented.
exportIntroChat:
## About this document

This document contains AI study conversations related to the **AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner (CLF-C02)** certification.

### Purpose
Records discussions and explanations generated during interactive AI study sessions, serving as complementary reference material.

domains.name: Cloud Concepts
domains.description: Domain 1 (24%): Define the AWS Cloud value proposition, identify aspects of AWS Cloud economics, describe cloud architecture design principles.

domains.name: Security and Compliance
domains.description: Domain 2 (30%): Define the AWS Shared Responsibility Model, define AWS Cloud security and compliance concepts, identify AWS access management capabilities, identify resources for security support.

domains.name: Cloud Technology and Services
domains.description: Domain 3 (34%): Define methods of deploying and operating in the AWS Cloud, define the AWS global infrastructure, identify AWS compute/network/database/storage services, identify AI/ML/analytics services.

domains.name: Billing, Pricing, and Support
domains.description: Domain 4 (12%): Compare AWS pricing models, understand account structures and billing, identify technical and billing support resources.
